channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Darnold pointed toward free agency after Vikings pass on franchise tag with McCarthy waiting
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings will likely let their starting quarterback set the NFL free agent market for a second straight offseason.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles make Saquon Barkley highest-paid running back in NFL history with surprising extension: reports
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have made Saquon Barkley the highest-paid running back in NFL history, reportedly giving him a two-year extension just one year after signing him in free agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL and is out for the season
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL in his left knee and will miss the rest of the season, the biggest setback in a season full of them for a team that traded superstar Luka Doncic.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: ACC, Clemson, Florida State approve settlement to end legal fight, change revenue-distribution model
item.description: The Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State are ready to move forward together after legal fights that threatened the stability of the league.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles sign Saquon Barkley to contract extension one year into new deal
item.description: (WHTM) — The Philadelphia Eagles are rewarding Saquon Barkley with a new contract less than a month after winning Super Bowl LIX. According to ESPN's Adam Schefter, the Eagles and Barkley agreed to a two-year, $41.2 million contract extension.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: Jets releasing wide receiver Davante Adams as new regime continues roster overhaul, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the decision tells The Associated Press the New York Jets are releasing wide receiver Davante Adams ahead of the start of the NFL’s new league year next week.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kerr: Officials need to call more traveling, including on Warriors
item.description: After watching film, the coach said he saw his own team travel four times in Saturday night’s loss to Philadelphia. None of them were called.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline by acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tennis legend has fiery response after Senate Dems fail to back bill keeping boys out of girls' sports
item.description: Tennis legend Martina Navratilova slammed Senate Democrats, who have no one from that side of the aisle voted for the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rivalry games highlight final week of college basketball's regular season
item.description: The college basketball season has wound down toward the end, with some conference tournaments already starting. The major conferences still have a week left in the regular season and that means rivalry games — and some big ones.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander making 50-point games a regular occurrence for the West-leading Thunder
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's putback basket in the fourth quarter put him over 50 points and sent the Oklahoma City crowd into a frenzy. The Thunder star responded by jogging downcourt expressionless, as if it were no big deal. That’s because it has become almost routine for him.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 51 as Thunder top Rockets 137-128 for 50th win
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 51 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Houston Rockets 137-128 on Monday night for their 50th win of the season. Gilgeous-Alexander reached 50 points for the fourth time this season, all in the past seven weeks.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off
item.description: It's time for everyone to start their engines as the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off on Friday, February 28.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Poles, Johnson detail 'clear vision' for Bears heading into NFL Scouting Combine
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to upgrade their offensive line and add a pass rusher in the upcoming NFL Scouting Combine, while also evaluating their running back and tight end positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
